---
name: Feature request
about: An idea for ToolFunnel
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that ToolFunnel currently can't (or makes awkward)?

**Proposed solution**
How you imagine it working — config shape, CLI flag, tool behaviour.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to get there, and why they're worse.

**Fit check**
ToolFunnel is zero-runtime-dependency by design. If your idea needs a new
dependency, say so here — and expect that to be the first discussion point.
